From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [SPS (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=SPS_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "SPS (disambiguation)"))

For Wikipedia's policy on self-published sources, see [WP:SPS](/wiki/Wikipedia:SPS "Wikipedia:SPS").

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[SPs](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/SPs "wiktionary:SPs")*** or ***[SPS](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/SPS "wiktionary:SPS")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**SPS** may refer to:

## Law and government

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Law and government")]

* [Agreement on the Application of Sanitary and Phytosanitary Measures](/wiki/Agreement_on_the_Application_of_Sanitary_and_Phytosanitary_Measures "Agreement on the Application of Sanitary and Phytosanitary Measures") of the WTO
* [NATO Science for Peace and Security](/wiki/NATO_Science_for_Peace_and_Security "NATO Science for Peace and Security")
* [Single Payment Scheme](/wiki/Single_Payment_Scheme "Single Payment Scheme"), an EU agricultural subsidy
* [The Standard Procurement System](/wiki/The_Standard_Procurement_System "The Standard Procurement System"), for the US Department of Defense
* [Somali Postal Service](/wiki/Somali_Postal_Service "Somali Postal Service")
* [Staff and Personnel Support Branch](/wiki/Staff_and_Personnel_Support_Branch "Staff and Personnel Support Branch"), part of the British Army Adjutant General's Corps
* Unofficial [ship prefix](/wiki/Ship_prefix "Ship prefix") for Spanish naval warships (Spanish Ship)

### Police and prisons

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Police and prisons")]

* [Scottish Prison Service](/wiki/Scottish_Prison_Service "Scottish Prison Service")
* [Singapore Prison Service](/wiki/Singapore_Prison_Service "Singapore Prison Service"), a government agency of the Government of Singapore under the hierarchy of the Ministry of Home Affairs
* Station police sergeant or [station sergeant](/wiki/Station_sergeant "Station sergeant"), former UK police rank
* [State Police Services (India)](/wiki/State_Police_Services_(India) "State Police Services (India)")
* [Surrey Police Service](/wiki/Surrey_Police_Service "Surrey Police Service"), British Columbia, Canada
* [Saskatoon Police Service](/wiki/Saskatoon_Police_Service "Saskatoon Police Service"), Saskatoon, Saskatchewan

## Organisations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Organisations")]

* [Sahara Press Service](/wiki/Sahara_Press_Service "Sahara Press Service"), of the Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic
* [Sierra Peaks Section](/wiki/Sierra_Peaks_Section "Sierra Peaks Section")
* [SPS Commerce](/wiki/SPS_Commerce "SPS Commerce")
* [SPS Technologies, Inc.](/wiki/Standard_Pressed_Steel "Standard Pressed Steel"), acquired by [Precision Castparts Corp.](/wiki/Precision_Castparts_Corp. "Precision Castparts Corp.")
* [Sussex Piscatorial Society](/wiki/Sussex_Piscatorial_Society "Sussex Piscatorial Society"), a fishing club in the UK
* Swiss Society of Proteomics, of [Life Sciences Switzerland](/wiki/Life_Sciences_Switzerland "Life Sciences Switzerland")

### Education

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Education")]

* [New York University School of Professional Studies](/wiki/New_York_University_School_of_Professional_Studies "New York University School of Professional Studies")
* [Sadiq Public School](/wiki/Sadiq_Public_School "Sadiq Public School"), a school in Bahawalpur, Punjab, Pakistan
* [Saint Paul Seminary](/wiki/Saint_Paul_Seminary "Saint Paul Seminary"), a Catholic seminary in St. Paul, Minnesota, US
* [Social and Political Sciences](/wiki/Social_and_Political_Sciences "Social and Political Sciences"), of the University of Cambridge, UK
* [Society of Physics Students](/wiki/Society_of_Physics_Students "Society of Physics Students")
* [Springfield Public Schools (Missouri)](/wiki/Springfield_Public_Schools_(Missouri) "Springfield Public Schools (Missouri)"), school district, US
* [St. Patrick's Higher Secondary School](/wiki/St._Patrick%27s_Higher_Secondary_School "St. Patrick's Higher Secondary School"), Asansol, India
* [St. Paul's School (disambiguation)](/wiki/St._Paul%27s_School_(disambiguation) "St. Paul's School (disambiguation)"), various schools
* [Stromness Primary School](/wiki/Stromness_Primary_School "Stromness Primary School"), a primary school in [Stromness, Orkney](/wiki/Stromness,_Orkney "Stromness, Orkney")

### Political parties

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Political parties")]

* [Socialist Party of Serbia](/wiki/Socialist_Party_of_Serbia "Socialist Party of Serbia") (*Socijalistička partija Srbije*), a political party in Serbia
* [Union of Right Forces](/wiki/Union_of_Right_Forces "Union of Right Forces") (*Soyuz Pravykh Sil*), a former political party in Russia
* [Soy Porque Somos](/wiki/Soy_Porque_Somos "Soy Porque Somos"), Colombian left-wing political movement founded in 2021

### Religion

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Religion")]

* [Saint Patrick’s Society for the Foreign Missions](/wiki/Saint_Patrick%E2%80%99s_Society_for_the_Foreign_Missions "Saint Patrick’s Society for the Foreign Missions"), Ireland, post-nominal
* [Society for Pentecostal Studies](/wiki/Society_for_Pentecostal_Studies "Society for Pentecostal Studies")

## Science and technology

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Science and technology")]

* [Solanapyrone synthase](/wiki/Solanapyrone_synthase "Solanapyrone synthase"), an enzyme
* [Sucrose-phosphate synthase](/wiki/Sucrose-phosphate_synthase "Sucrose-phosphate synthase"), a plant enzyme involved in sucrose biosynthesis
* [Spark plasma sintering](/wiki/Spark_plasma_sintering "Spark plasma sintering")
* [Special weather statement](/wiki/Special_weather_statement "Special weather statement"), US
* [Stand-alone power system](/wiki/Stand-alone_power_system "Stand-alone power system"), an off-the-grid electricity system
* Standard positioning service, a [Global Positioning System](/wiki/Global_Positioning_System "Global Positioning System") feature
* [Super Proton Synchrotron](/wiki/Super_Proton_Synchrotron "Super Proton Synchrotron"), a particle accelerator at CERN

### Computing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Computing")]

* [Shell Processing Support](/wiki/Shell_Processing_Support "Shell Processing Support"), a file format for seismic data
* [IBM 1401 Symbolic Programming System](/wiki/IBM_1401_Symbolic_Programming_System "IBM 1401 Symbolic Programming System") and IBM 1620/1710 Symbolic Programming System, assemblers

### Medicine and psychology

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Medicine and psychology")]

* [Sensory processing sensitivity](/wiki/Sensory_processing_sensitivity "Sensory processing sensitivity"), the defining personality trait of Highly Sensitive Persons (HSPs)
* [Serrated polyposis syndrome](/wiki/Serrated_polyposis_syndrome "Serrated polyposis syndrome"), a disorder characterized by the appearance of serrated [polyps](/wiki/Polyp_(medicine) "Polyp (medicine)") in the colon
* [Sterile processing service](/wiki/Sterile_processing_service "Sterile processing service")
* [Stiff-person syndrome](/wiki/Stiff-person_syndrome "Stiff-person syndrome"), a rare neurologic disorder
* [Syntactic positive shift](/wiki/Syntactic_positive_shift "Syntactic positive shift"), a peak in brain activity

### Military and space

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Military and space")]

* Service propulsion system in the [Apollo service module](/wiki/Apollo_service_module#Service_Module_(SM) "Apollo service module")
* [Solar power satellite](/wiki/Solar_power_satellite "Solar power satellite"), to beam power to Earth
* Side protection system or [torpedo belt](/wiki/Torpedo_belt "Torpedo belt") of a warship
* [SR-1 Vektor](/wiki/SR-1_Vektor "SR-1 Vektor") (Samozaryadnyj Pistolet Serdjukova – Serdyukov Self-loading pistol)

## Transportation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Transportation")]

* [Wichita Falls Municipal Airport](/wiki/Wichita_Falls_Municipal_Airport "Wichita Falls Municipal Airport") (IATA airport code)
* [Spokane, Portland and Seattle Railway](/wiki/Spokane,_Portland_and_Seattle_Railway "Spokane, Portland and Seattle Railway"), a defunct railroad in the United States

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* Abbreviation of [San Pedro Sula](/wiki/San_Pedro_Sula "San Pedro Sula"), second largest city in Honduras.
* [Sony Imaging Pro Support](/wiki/Sony_Imaging_Pro_Support "Sony Imaging Pro Support"), for photographers
* [SPS (Mongolia)](/wiki/SPS_(Mongolia) "SPS (Mongolia)"), a TV channel
* [Sam Petrevski-Seton](/wiki/Sam_Petrevski-Seton "Sam Petrevski-Seton"), an Australian rules footballer
* "S.P.S.", a song by Kasabian from the album *[48:13](/wiki/48:13 "48:13")*

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SPS&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: See also")]
